verified.name: Notion
verified.description: Notion listed as OAuth but exposes a keyless read route we verified (Documents & Productivity). Check docs for auth on write routes.

agent_id.description: The ID of the parent agent.

bold.description: Whether the text is formatted as bold.

italic.description: Whether the text is formatted as italic.

strikethrough.description: Whether the text is formatted with a strikethrough.

underline.description: Whether the text is formatted with an underline.

code.description: Whether the text is formatted as code.

notionVersion.name: Notion-Version
notionVersion.description: The [API version](/reference/versioning) to use for this request. The latest version is `2026-03-11`.

x-codeSamples.label: TypeScript SDK
TypeScript SDK
TypeScript SDK
TypeScript SDK

markdown.description: Page content as Notion-flavored Markdown. Mutually exclusive with content/children.

allow_async.description: Set to true to receive an async_task response for markdown page creation. Only supported when markdown is provided.

x-codeSamples.label: TypeScript SDK

schema.description: The ID of the page to retrieve.
Supply a list of property IDs to filter properties in the response. Note that if a page doesn't have a property, it won't be included in the filtered response.

x-codeSamples.label: TypeScript SDK

is_locked.description: Whether the page should be locked from editing in the Notion app UI. If not provided, the locked state will not be updated.

erase_content.description: Whether to erase all existing content from the page. When used with a template, the template content replaces the existing content. When used without a template, simply clears the page content.

x-codeSamples.label: TypeScript SDK

schema.description: The ID of the page to move.

page_id.description: The ID of the parent page (with or without dashes), for example, 195de9221179449fab8075a27c979105

data_source_id.description: The ID of the parent data source (collection), with or without dashes. For example, f336d0bc-b841-465b-8045-024475c079dd

parent.description: The new parent of the page.

x-codeSamples.label: TypeScript SDK
TypeScript SDK

schema.description: The ID of the page (or block) to retrieve as markdown. Non-navigable block IDs from truncated responses can be passed here to fetch their subtrees.
Whether to include meeting note transcripts. Defaults to false. When true, full transcripts are included; when false, a placeholder with the meeting note URL is shown instead.

patch.summary: Update a page's content as markdown

x-codeSamples.label: TypeScript SDK

schema.description: The ID of the page to update.

allow_async.description: Set to true to opt into receiving an async_task result when this update operation is accepted for background execution. If omitted or false, the endpoint keeps the existing synchronous response shape.

content.description: The enhanced markdown content to insert into the page.

after.description: Selection of existing content to insert after, using the ellipsis format ("start text...end text"). Omit to append at the end of the page.

type.description: Insert the content at the start of the page.
Insert the content at the end of the page.

position.description: Explicit position for inserted content. Use {"type":"start"} to prepend or {"type":"end"} to append. Cannot be combined with after.

insert_content.description: Insert new content into the page.

examples:
## Updated Section

New content replaces the old.
content.description: The new enhanced markdown content to replace the matched range.

content_range.description: Selection of existing content to replace, using the ellipsis format ("start text...end text").

allow_deleting_content.description: Set to true to allow the operation to delete child pages or databases. Defaults to false.

replace_content_range.description: Replace a range of content in the page.
